tasks.title: Backend journal CRUD service + handler + routes
tasks.description:
The backend has JournalEntry and JournalStreak models defined in /backend/internal/models/journal.go but ZERO endpoints to create, read, update, or delete journal entries. This is the core feature of the app and is completely missing.

Create /backend/internal/services/journal_service.go:
- type JournalService struct { db *gorm.DB }
- func NewJournalService(db *gorm.DB) *JournalService
- func (s *JournalService) CreateEntry(userID uuid.UUID, req dto.CreateJournalRequest) (*models.JournalEntry, error) — validates MoodEmoji is in the allowed set (ValidMoodEmojis from journal.go), validates MoodScore 1-100, validates CardColor is in ValidCardColors, sets EntryDate to now if empty, creates entry, then calls UpdateStreak
- func (s *JournalService) GetEntries(userID uuid.UUID, limit, offset int) ([]models.JournalEntry, int64, error) — paginated list ordered by entry_date DESC, returns total count
- func (s *JournalService) GetEntry(userID uuid.UUID, entryID uuid.UUID) (*models.JournalEntry, error) — single entry with ownership check
- func (s *JournalService) UpdateEntry(userID uuid.UUID, entryID uuid.UUID, req dto.UpdateJournalRequest) (*models.JournalEntry, error) — ownership check, partial update
- func (s *JournalService) DeleteEntry(userID uuid.UUID, entryID uuid.UUID) error — soft delete with ownership check
- func (s *JournalService) GetStreak(userID uuid.UUID) (*models.JournalStreak, error) — returns or creates default streak
- func (s *JournalService) UpdateStreak(userID uuid.UUID) error — compares LastEntryDate with today: if same day do nothing, if yesterday increment CurrentStreak, if older reset to 1. Update LongestStreak if CurrentStreak exceeds it. Increment TotalEntries.

Create /backend/internal/dto/journal_dto.go:
- CreateJournalRequest { mood_emoji string, mood_score int, content string, photo_url string, card_color string, is_private bool }
- UpdateJournalRequest { mood_emoji *string, mood_score *int, content *string, photo_url *string, card_color *string, is_private *bool }
- JournalListResponse { entries []JournalEntry, total int64, limit int, offset int }

Create /backend/internal/handlers/journal_handler.go:
- type JournalHandler struct { service *services.JournalService }
- POST handler parsing CreateJournalRequest, calling service.CreateEntry, returning 201
- GET list handler with query params ?limit=20&offset=0
- GET /:id handler
- PUT /:id handler parsing UpdateJournalRequest
- DELETE /:id handler returning 204
- GET /streak handler returning user's streak

Update /backend/internal/routes/routes.go:
- Add protected group: journals := protected.Group("/journals")
- journals.Post("/", journalHandler.Create)
- journals.Get("/", journalHandler.List)
- journals.Get("/:id", journalHandler.Get)
- journals.Put("/:id", journalHandler.Update)
- journals.Delete("/:id", journalHandler.Delete)
- protected.Get("/streak", journalHandler.GetStreak)

Instantiate JournalService and JournalHandler in routes.go Setup function.

tasks.title: Mobile onboarding flow with 3 screens
tasks.description:
The app currently redirects directly from index.tsx to auth/login with no onboarding. Create a 3-screen onboarding experience.

Create /mobile/lib/onboarding.ts:
- import AsyncStorage from '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage' — NOTE: this package is already available via expo (expo provides it)
- Use expo-secure-store instead since it's already installed: import * as SecureStore from 'expo-secure-store'
- export async function hasSeenOnboarding(): Promise<boolean> — reads 'onboarding_complete' from SecureStore, returns true if 'true'
- export async function setOnboardingSeen(): Promise<void> — writes 'onboarding_complete' = 'true'

Create /mobile/app/onboarding.tsx — Single file with 3 pages using ScrollView horizontal paging:
- State: currentPage (0, 1, 2), scrollViewRef
- Page 1 (Welcome): Large emoji '📓' centered, title 'Welcome to Daiyly' in text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900, subtitle 'Your aesthetic mood journal' in text-lg text-gray-500 mt-2, body text 'Capture your feelings, track your moods, and discover patterns in your emotional journey.' in text-base text-gray-600 mt-4 text-center px-8
- Page 2 (Features): Emoji '✨', title 'Beautiful & Personal', 3 feature rows each with icon + text: '🎨 Choose colors that match your mood', '📊 Track your emotional patterns', '🔥 Build daily journaling streaks'
- Page 3 (CTA): Emoji '🚀', title 'Start Your Journey', two buttons: Primary 'Try Free' (bg-blue-600 rounded-2xl py-4) calls setOnboardingSeen then router.replace('/(auth)/login'), Secondary 'Sign In' (border border-blue-600 rounded-2xl py-4 mt-3) same action
- Dot indicators at bottom: 3 circles, active = bg-blue-600 w-3 h-3, inactive = bg-gray-300 w-2 h-2
- Background: bg-white, each page is full screen width using Dimensions.get('window').width
- Import hapticLight from lib/haptics, fire on page change

Update /mobile/app/index.tsx:
- Import hasSeenOnboarding
- In useEffect: check hasSeenOnboarding() first. If false, router.replace('/onboarding'). If true, check auth state then redirect to login or home.
- Add isCheckingOnboarding state to prevent flash

tasks.title: Guest mode with 3 free uses counter
tasks.description:
Implement guest mode allowing 3 free journal entries without login. This satisfies Apple Guideline 5.1.1(v) — apps must provide value without mandatory account creation.

Create /mobile/lib/guest.ts:
- import * as SecureStore from 'expo-secure-store'
- const GUEST_USES_KEY = 'guest_uses_count'
- const GUEST_ENTRIES_KEY = 'guest_entries'
- export async function getGuestUsesCount(): Promise<number> — reads and parses int from SecureStore, returns 0 if not set
- export async function incrementGuestUses(): Promise<number> — reads current, increments, writes back, returns new count
- export async function hasGuestUsesRemaining(): Promise<boolean> — returns count < 3
- export async function saveGuestEntry(entry: GuestEntry): Promise<void> — reads existing array from GUEST_ENTRIES_KEY (JSON), appends new entry, writes back. GuestEntry = { id: string (uuid), mood_emoji: string, mood_score: number, content: string, card_color: string, created_at: string }
- export async function getGuestEntries(): Promise<GuestEntry[]> — reads and parses JSON array
- export async function clearGuestData(): Promise<void> — deletes both keys

Update /mobile/app/index.tsx:
- Add guest mode check: after onboarding, before auth check, check if user is not authenticated. If not, allow navigation to guest home.
- New routing logic: onboarding → guest/auth check → if authenticated go to (protected)/home, if not go to (auth)/login but with 'Skip for now' option visible

Update /mobile/app/(auth)/login.tsx:
- Add 'Skip for now' link below the sign-in button: <Pressable onPress={() => router.replace('/(protected)/home')}><Text className='text-blue-600 text-sm mt-4 text-center'>Skip for now — 3 free entries</Text></Pressable>
- Import hapticLight, fire on skip press

Update /mobile/contexts/AuthContext.tsx:
- Add isGuest boolean to context type and state
- When user skips login, set isGuest = true
- Provide isGuest through context so screens can check remaining uses and show upgrade prompts
- Add method enterGuestMode() that sets isGuest = true and navigates to home

tasks.title: Mobile journal creation screen with mood picker
tasks.description:
The home screen currently shows placeholder text 'Your MVP starts here. This is the Phase 0 Master Template.' Replace it with a full journal entry creation experience.

Rewrite /mobile/app/(protected)/home.tsx completely:
- State: moodEmoji (string, default ''), moodScore (number, default 50), content (string), cardColor (string, default '#dbeafe'), isSubmitting (boolean), showSuccess (boolean), todayEntry (JournalEntry|null), streak ({ current_streak, longest_streak, total_entries })
- On mount (useEffect): fetch today's entry via GET /api/journals?limit=1&offset=0 to check if already journaled today. Fetch streak via GET /api/streak.

Streak banner at top:
- View className='bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl p-4 mx-4 mt-2 flex-row items-center justify-between'
- Left: '🔥' emoji + '{streak.current_streak} day streak' in text-lg font-bold
- Right: 'Total: {streak.total_entries}' in text-sm text-gray-500

Mood Emoji Picker:
- Text 'How are you feeling?' className='text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 px-4 mt-6'
- ScrollView horizontal with 10 emojis from the backend ValidMoodEmojis: ['😊','😢','😡','😰','😴','🥳','😌','🤔','😍','😤']
- Each emoji in Pressable className='w-14 h-14 rounded-full items-center justify-center mx-1' + selected state: 'bg-blue-100 border-2 border-blue-500'
- Text className='text-3xl' for each emoji
- hapticSelection() on press

Mood Score Slider:
- Text 'Mood Level: {moodScore}' className='text-base font-medium text-gray-700 px-4 mt-4'
- Use a simple row of 5 Pressable circles representing 1-20-40-60-80-100, styled as dots that fill with blue when selected/below threshold
- Or implement as a simple TextInput type='number' with +/- buttons if Slider not available

Card Color Picker:
- Text 'Card Color' className='text-base font-medium text-gray-700 px-4 mt-4'
- Row of 6 color circles from ValidCardColors: ['#fef3c7','#dbeafe','#dcfce7','#fce7f3','#ede9fe','#fef2f2']
- Each: Pressable className='w-10 h-10 rounded-full mx-2 border-2' style={{ backgroundColor: color }}, selected adds border-blue-600

Journal Content:
- TextInput multiline className='bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl p-4 mx-4 mt-4 text-base text-gray-900 min-h-[120px]' placeholder='Write about your day...' placeholderTextColor='#9ca3af' textAlignVertical='top'

Submit Button:
- Button title='Save Entry' variant='primary' isLoading={isSubmitting} disabled={!moodEmoji || !content}
- onPress: POST /api/journals with { mood_emoji, mood_score, content, card_color, is_private: true }
- For guest mode: call saveGuestEntry() from lib/guest.ts, increment guest uses, show upgrade prompt if uses >= 3
- On success: hapticSuccess(), show success animation (showSuccess = true for 2 seconds), refresh streak
- On error: hapticError(), Alert.alert with error message

Success overlay:
- When showSuccess: View className='absolute inset-0 bg-white/90 items-center justify-center' with '✅' text-6xl and 'Entry saved!' text-xl font-bold text-gray-900

tasks.title: Mobile journal history screen with timeline view
tasks.description:
Create a new tab screen showing the user's journal history as beautiful cards in a scrollable timeline.

Create /mobile/app/(protected)/history.tsx:
- State: entries (JournalEntry[]), isLoading (boolean), isRefreshing (boolean), total (number), page (number, default 0)
- On mount: fetchEntries(0) — GET /api/journals?limit=20&offset=0, parse response { entries, total, limit, offset }
- For guest mode: load from getGuestEntries() in lib/guest.ts

Types — add to /mobile/types/auth.ts (or create /mobile/types/journal.ts):
- interface JournalEntry { id: string, mood_emoji: string, mood_score: number, content: string, photo_url: string, card_color: string, entry_date: string, is_private: boolean, created_at: string }
- interface JournalStreak { current_streak: number, longest_streak: number, total_entries: number, last_entry_date: string }

Screen Layout:
- SafeAreaView className='flex-1 bg-white'
- Header: Text 'Journal History' className='text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 px-4 pt-4'
- Subtitle: Text '{total} entries' className='text-sm text-gray-500 px-4 mt-1'

Entry Card Component (inline or separate):
- Pressable className='mx-4 mb-4 rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-sm' style={{ backgroundColor: entry.card_color }}
- Top row: mood_emoji (text-3xl) + entry_date formatted as 'Mon, Jan 5' (text-sm text-gray-600) + mood_score badge (rounded-full bg-white/80 px-2 py-1)
- Content: Text className='text-base text-gray-800 mt-2' numberOfLines={3}
- Bottom: time ago text (text-xs text-gray-500)

FlatList:
- data={entries}, renderItem renders EntryCard
- onRefresh: fetchEntries(0) with setIsRefreshing
- refreshing={isRefreshing}
- onEndReached: if entries.length < total, fetchEntries(page + 1) — append to entries
- onEndReachedThreshold={0.5}
- ListEmptyComponent: View className='items-center justify-center py-20' with '📝' text-6xl, 'No entries yet' text-xl font-bold text-gray-400 mt-4, 'Start journaling to see your history' text-base text-gray-400 mt-2
- ListFooterComponent: ActivityIndicator when loading more

Update /mobile/app/(protected)/_layout.tsx:
- Add history tab to the tab bar. The existing layout uses Slot with custom tab bar (Pressable tabs). Add a third tab: icon '📖', label 'History', route '/(protected)/history'
- Tab order: Home (📝), History (📖), Settings (⚙️)

tasks.title: Shareable mood result card with gradient background
tasks.description:
After saving a journal entry, generate a shareable card image-style view that users can share to social media. This drives organic growth.

Create /mobile/components/ui/MoodCard.tsx:
- Props: { moodEmoji: string, moodScore: number, date: string, streakCount: number, cardColor: string, onShare: () => void }
- Container: View className='rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-lg mx-4' style={{ backgroundColor: cardColor }}
- Inner padding: View className='p-6'
- Top section: Large emoji text-6xl centered, mood score below as 'Mood: {moodScore}/100' className='text-lg font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mt-3'
- Mood label: map score to label — 0-20: 'Feeling Low', 21-40: 'A Bit Down', 41-60: 'Neutral', 61-80: 'Feeling Good', 81-100: 'Amazing!' — text-2xl font-bold text-center mt-2
- Date: formatted as 'February 7, 2026' className='text-sm text-gray-600 text-center mt-4'
- Streak badge: View className='bg-white/50 rounded-full px-4 py-2 self-center mt-3 flex-row items-center' with '🔥 {streakCount} day streak'
- Divider: View className='h-px bg-gray-300/50 my-4'
- App branding: Text 'Daiyly' className='text-xs text-gray-500 text-center tracking-widest uppercase'
- Share button overlay: Pressable className='absolute top-4 right-4 bg-white/80 rounded-full w-10 h-10 items-center justify-center' with share icon '↗' text-lg, onPress calls onShare

Create /mobile/lib/share.ts:
- import { Share } from 'react-native'
- export async function shareResult(moodEmoji: string, moodLabel: string, streakCount: number): Promise<void>
- Share.share({ message: `${moodEmoji} My mood today: ${moodLabel}! ${streakCount} day streak on Daiyly 📓`, title: 'My Daiyly Mood' })
- Wrap in try/catch, ignore dismissal errors

Update /mobile/app/(protected)/home.tsx:
- After successful entry save, instead of just showing '✅', show the MoodCard component with share prompt
- Add 'Share Your Mood' button below the card (bg-blue-600 rounded-2xl py-4)
- Add 'Done' text button to dismiss (text-gray-500 mt-3)
- Import and call shareResult from lib/share.ts on share press
- hapticSuccess() before showing card

tasks.title: Daily streak system with visual rewards
tasks.description:
Implement a complete daily streak system with visual milestone rewards. Backend already has JournalStreak model; this task connects it end-to-end and adds gamification.

Backend changes in /backend/internal/services/journal_service.go (should already exist from enhance_001):
- Ensure UpdateStreak correctly handles timezone: use UTC truncated to day
- Add milestone detection: return a milestone string if CurrentStreak hits 3, 7, 14, 21, 30, 50 days
- Milestones map: 3='🥉 Bronze Journaler', 7='🥈 Silver Journaler', 14='🥇 Gold Journaler', 21='💎 Diamond Journaler', 30='👑 Monthly Master', 50='🌟 Legendary Journaler'

Create /mobile/components/ui/StreakBadge.tsx:
- Props: { currentStreak: number, longestStreak: number, totalEntries: number }
- Container: View className='bg-gradient-to-r rounded-2xl p-4 mx-4' — since NativeWind v4 doesn't support gradient, use a View with style={{ backgroundColor: streakColor }} where streakColor is based on streak level: 0='#f3f4f6', 1-2='#dbeafe', 3-6='#fef3c7', 7-13='#dcfce7', 14-20='#ede9fe', 21-29='#fce7f3', 30+='#fef2f2'
- Top row: '🔥' + current streak count (text-2xl font-bold) + 'day streak' label
- Stats row (flex-row justify-between mt-3): 'Longest: {longestStreak}' and 'Total: {totalEntries}'
- Progress dots: Row of 7 small circles representing this week's consistency (filled = journaled that day). Use the entries from GET /api/journals?limit=7 to determine which days are filled.

Create /mobile/components/ui/MilestoneModal.tsx:
- Props: { visible: boolean, milestone: string, streakCount: number, onClose: () => void }
- Modal overlay with celebration theme
- Large milestone emoji (text-6xl) centered with scale animation
- Milestone title (text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900)
- 'You reached a {streakCount}-day streak!' subtitle
- Confetti-style decorative elements: scattered emoji ('🎉', '⭐', '✨') positioned absolutely
- 'Keep Going!' primary button to dismiss
- hapticSuccess() on show

Update /mobile/app/(protected)/home.tsx:
- Replace simple streak banner with StreakBadge component
- After saving entry, check if response includes milestone. If yes, show MilestoneModal
- Store last shown milestone in SecureStore to avoid re-showing

tasks.title: Custom tab bar with Slot and haptic feedback
tasks.description:
The current (protected)/_layout.tsx likely uses expo-router's Tabs component. Replace with a custom Slot-based tab bar for full NativeWind v4 compatibility and aesthetic control.

Rewrite /mobile/app/(protected)/_layout.tsx:
- Import { Slot, usePathname, useRouter } from 'expo-router'
- Import { View, Pressable, Text, Platform } from 'react-native'
- Import { useSafeAreaInsets } from 'react-native-safe-area-context'
- Import { hapticSelection } from '../../lib/haptics'
- Import { useAuth } from '../../contexts/AuthContext'

Auth guard:
- const { isAuthenticated, isLoading, isGuest } = useAuth()
- If isLoading: return full-screen ActivityIndicator with 'Loading...' text
- If !isAuthenticated && !isGuest: router.replace('/(auth)/login'), return null

Tab configuration array:
- const tabs = [ { route: '/(protected)/home', label: 'Journal', icon: '📝' }, { route: '/(protected)/history', label: 'History', icon: '📖' }, { route: '/(protected)/settings', label: 'Settings', icon: '⚙️' } ]
- Note: paywall is NOT in tabs (accessed programmatically)

Layout:
- View className='flex-1 bg-white'
- <Slot /> takes remaining space (flex-1)
- Bottom tab bar: View className='flex-row border-t border-gray-100 bg-white' style={{ paddingBottom: insets.bottom || 16 }}
- Each tab: Pressable className='flex-1 items-center pt-3 pb-2' onPress={() => { hapticSelection(); router.push(tab.route) }
- Tab icon: Text className='text-2xl' (emoji)
- Tab label: Text className={ isActive ? 'text-xs font-medium text-blue-600 mt-1' : 'text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1' }
- Active indicator: View className='w-1 h-1 rounded-full bg-blue-600 mt-1' (only when active)
- isActive determined by: pathname.startsWith(tab.route) or pathname includes the tab's page name

Shadow on tab bar (iOS):
- style={{ shadowColor: '#000', shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: -2 }, shadowOpacity: 0.05, shadowRadius: 8, elevation: 8 }}

This replaces any existing Tabs/Stack navigator with the Slot pattern recommended for NativeWind v4.

tasks.title: Settings screen polish with all integrations
tasks.description:
The current settings screen has stubs for biometrics and restore purchases. Wire everything up and add missing sections.

Rewrite /mobile/app/(protected)/settings.tsx:

Imports: useAuth, useSubscription, hapticSelection/hapticSuccess/hapticError, isBiometricAvailable/getBiometricType/authenticateWithBiometrics from respective libs, SecureStore, Alert, Platform, Linking

State: biometricEnabled (boolean), biometricType (string), showDeleteModal (boolean), deletePassword (string), isDeleting (boolean)

On mount useEffect:
- Check biometric availability, get type, read stored preference from SecureStore 'biometric_enabled'
- Load subscription status

Screen layout — ScrollView className='flex-1 bg-gray-50':

Profile Section:
- View className='bg-white rounded-2xl mx-4 mt-4 p-4 shadow-sm'
- User avatar circle: View className='w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-blue-100 items-center justify-center' with first letter of email in text-2xl font-bold text-blue-600
- Email display: text-base font-medium text-gray-900
- Member since: formatted date, text-sm text-gray-500

Subscription Section:
- View className='bg-white rounded-2xl mx-4 mt-4 p-4 shadow-sm'
- Section title 'Subscription' text-lg font-bold text-gray-900
- If subscribed: green badge 'Premium Active' with checkmark
- If not: 'Free Plan' with 'Upgrade' button → router.push('/(protected)/paywall')
- Restore Purchases: Pressable calling handleRestore() from SubscriptionContext (NOT Alert stub). On success hapticSuccess + Alert 'Purchases restored'. On failure hapticError + Alert error.

Security Section:
- View className='bg-white rounded-2xl mx-4 mt-4 p-4 shadow-sm'
- Biometric toggle: row with biometricType label + Switch component
- On toggle: if enabling, call authenticateWithBiometrics first to verify. Store preference in SecureStore. hapticSelection on change.

About Section:
- App version '1.0.0'
- Privacy Policy link (Pressable → Linking.openURL)
- Terms of Service link

Danger Zone:
- View className='bg-white rounded-2xl mx-4 mt-4 mb-8 p-4 shadow-sm border border-red-100'
- Sign Out: Button variant='outline' calling logout(), hapticWarning before
- Delete Account: Button variant='destructive' opening confirmation Alert, then password modal
- Password modal uses existing Modal component from components/ui/Modal.tsx
- On delete confirm: call deleteAccount(password), handle errors with hapticError

tasks.title: Loading states, error states, and empty states everywhere
tasks.description:
Add proper loading, error, and empty states to every screen. Apple rejects apps with broken states or missing feedback.

Create /mobile/components/ui/LoadingScreen.tsx:
- Props: { message?: string }
- View className='flex-1 bg-white items-center justify-center'
- ActivityIndicator size='large' color='#2563eb'
- Text className='text-base text-gray-500 mt-4' showing message or 'Loading...'

Create /mobile/components/ui/ErrorState.tsx:
- Props: { message: string, onRetry?: () => void }
- View className='flex-1 bg-white items-center justify-center px-8'
- '⚠️' emoji text-5xl
- Text 'Something went wrong' className='text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mt-4'
- Text message className='text-base text-gray-500 mt-2 text-center'
- If onRetry: Button title='Try Again' variant='primary' className='mt-6' onPress={onRetry}

Create /mobile/components/ui/EmptyState.tsx:
- Props: { icon: string, title: string, subtitle: string, actionLabel?: string, onAction?: () => void }
- View className='flex-1 items-center justify-center px-8 py-20'
- Icon: Text className='text-6xl' with icon emoji
- Title: Text className='text-xl font-bold text-gray-400 mt-4 text-center'
- Subtitle: Text className='text-base text-gray-400 mt-2 text-center'
- If actionLabel + onAction: Button title={actionLabel} variant='primary' className='mt-6'

Update /mobile/app/(protected)/home.tsx:
- Wrap in SafeAreaView className='flex-1 bg-white'
- Add RefreshControl to ScrollView: onRefresh reloads streak and today's entry
- Show LoadingScreen while fetching initial data
- Show ErrorState with retry on API failure
- KeyboardAvoidingView wrapping the content area for the TextInput

Update /mobile/app/(protected)/history.tsx:
- Use EmptyState as ListEmptyComponent: icon='📝', title='No entries yet', subtitle='Start journaling to see your history here', actionLabel='Write First Entry', onAction navigates to home
- Show LoadingScreen on initial load
- Show ErrorState with retry on API failure
- Pull-to-refresh with RefreshControl

Update /mobile/app/(protected)/settings.tsx:
- Show LoadingScreen while checking biometric availability and subscription status
- Wrap in ScrollView with RefreshControl

Update /mobile/app/(protected)/paywall.tsx:
- Show LoadingScreen while fetching offerings
- Show ErrorState if offerings fail to load
- EmptyState if no packages available: icon='💎', title='Coming Soon', subtitle='Premium features will be available soon'

tasks.title: App branding: name, colors, splash, app.json config
tasks.description:
The app.json still has generic names ('mobile', 'appfactory' scheme). Update all branding to Daiyly.

Update /mobile/app.json:
- name: 'Daiyly'
- slug: 'daiyly'
- scheme: 'daiyly'

- icon: keep as is (will be designed separately)

- plugins: keep existing ['expo-router', 'expo-secure-store'], add 'expo-apple-authentication'

Update /mobile/app/_layout.tsx:

Update /mobile/app/(auth)/login.tsx:
- Replace any 'App Factory' or generic titles with 'Daiyly'
- Header: '📓' emoji + 'Daiyly' text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900

Update /mobile/app/(auth)/register.tsx:
- Same branding: '📓 Daiyly' header
- Subtitle: 'Create your account'

Update home.tsx header:
- Replace 'App Factory' with 'Daiyly'
- Replace 'Welcome, {email}' with greeting based on time of day: 'Good morning ☀️' (5-12), 'Good afternoon 🌤' (12-17), 'Good evening 🌙' (17-5) + user's first name or email prefix

Update the existing tailwind.config.js if needed — the blue primary palette is already perfect for Daiyly's aesthetic.

tasks.title: Mood insights and weekly summary view
tasks.description:
Add a simple mood insights section to the home screen that shows weekly mood patterns. No external AI needed — just data aggregation from the user's own entries.

Backend addition in /backend/internal/services/journal_service.go:
- func (s *JournalService) GetWeeklyInsights(userID uuid.UUID) (*dto.WeeklyInsights, error)
- Query: SELECT mood_emoji, mood_score, entry_date FROM journal_entries WHERE user_id = ? AND entry_date >= ? AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY entry_date ASC (last 7 days)
- Compute: averageMoodScore (int), moodTrend ('improving'|'declining'|'stable' based on first half vs second half avg), topMood (most frequent emoji), totalEntries (count), dailyScores (array of { date, score } for sparkline)

Add to /backend/internal/dto/journal_dto.go:
- type WeeklyInsights struct { AverageMoodScore int, MoodTrend string, TopMood string, TotalEntries int, DailyScores []DailyScore }
- type DailyScore struct { Date string, Score int }

Add handler in /backend/internal/handlers/journal_handler.go:
- func (h *JournalHandler) GetWeeklyInsights — GET /api/journals/insights — calls service, returns JSON

Add route in /backend/internal/routes/routes.go:
- journals.Get("/insights", journalHandler.GetWeeklyInsights)

Create /mobile/components/ui/WeeklyInsights.tsx:
- Props: { averageScore: number, trend: string, topMood: string, totalEntries: number, dailyScores: { date: string, score: number }[] }
- Container: View className='bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 mx-4 mt-4 shadow-sm'
- Title: 'This Week' text-lg font-bold text-gray-900
- Stats row (flex-row justify-between mt-3):
  - Avg Mood: circular progress-like View with score number in center, border colored by score range
  - Trend: arrow emoji (📈/📉/➡️) + trend text
  - Top Mood: topMood emoji large (text-2xl)
  - Entries: totalEntries + '/7' label
- Mini sparkline: Row of 7 vertical bars (View), each bar height = dailyScores[i].score / 100 * 40 (max 40px), width=8, rounded-full, bg-blue-400 for filled days, bg-gray-200 for missing. Day initial letters below.
- If totalEntries < 2: show 'Journal more to see insights' text-sm text-gray-400 instead of chart

Update /mobile/app/(protected)/home.tsx:
- Fetch insights on mount: GET /api/journals/insights
- Render WeeklyInsights component between streak badge and mood picker
- Only show if user has >= 2 entries this week
- For guest mode: compute locally from getGuestEntries()
tasks.test_command: cd backend && go build ./... && cd ../mobile && npx tsc --noEmit

tasks.title: Pull-to-refresh, keyboard handling, and scroll polish
tasks.description:
Add critical UX polish across all screens: pull-to-refresh, keyboard avoidance, smooth scrolling, and proper safe areas.

Update /mobile/app/(protected)/home.tsx:
- Wrap entire content in KeyboardAvoidingView behavior={Platform.OS === 'ios' ? 'padding' : 'height'} className='flex-1'
- Use ScrollView with RefreshControl: refreshing={isRefreshing}, onRefresh reloads streak + insights + todayEntry
- Add keyboardShouldPersistTaps='handled' to ScrollView
- Dismiss keyboard on scroll: onScrollBeginDrag={() => Keyboard.dismiss()}
- Add contentContainerStyle={{ paddingBottom: 100 }} to prevent content being hidden behind tab bar

Update /mobile/app/(protected)/history.tsx:
- FlatList already supports RefreshControl — ensure it's wired up
- Add contentContainerStyle={{ paddingBottom: 100 }}
- Smooth scroll: decelerationRate='normal', showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}

Update /mobile/app/(protected)/settings.tsx:
- Wrap in ScrollView with RefreshControl
- onRefresh: re-check subscription status, biometric availability
- Add contentContainerStyle={{ paddingBottom: 100 }}

Update /mobile/app/(auth)/login.tsx:
- KeyboardAvoidingView wrapping the form
- ScrollView with keyboardShouldPersistTaps='handled'
- Dismiss keyboard on background press: Pressable onPress={Keyboard.dismiss} wrapping content

Update /mobile/app/(auth)/register.tsx:
- Same keyboard handling as login

Update /mobile/app/onboarding.tsx:
- Ensure StatusBar is hidden or light for immersive feel: <StatusBar barStyle='dark-content' />
- Disable scroll indicator on horizontal ScrollView: showsHorizontalScrollIndicator={false}

All screens should import { Platform, KeyboardAvoidingView, Keyboard, RefreshControl } from 'react-native' and { SafeAreaView } from 'react-native-safe-area-context'. Every screen's root must be SafeAreaView className='flex-1 bg-white' (or bg-gray-50 for settings).

tasks.title: Register auto-login and auth flow fixes
tasks.description:
Currently registration and login may have flow issues. Ensure register auto-logs in, login navigates correctly, and the full auth flow is seamless.

Update /mobile/contexts/AuthContext.tsx:
- register() method: after successful POST /api/auth/register, automatically save tokens via setTokens(), set user and isAuthenticated = true, call hapticSuccess(). Do NOT require a separate login after registration.
- login() method: after successful POST /api/auth/login, save tokens, set user, set isAuthenticated = true, hapticSuccess(). Router.replace('/(protected)/home').
- loginWithApple(): same flow — save tokens, set state, hapticSuccess(), navigate.
- logout(): clearTokens(), set user null, isAuthenticated false, isGuest false, hapticLight(), router.replace('/(auth)/login').
- deleteAccount(): call DELETE /api/auth/account with password in body, clearTokens(), reset state, router.replace('/(auth)/login'), hapticSuccess().
- Session restore on app launch: in useEffect, check if access token exists in SecureStore. If yes, try GET /api/health (or a lightweight /api/auth/me endpoint). If 401, try refresh. If refresh fails, clearTokens. This prevents stale sessions.

Update /mobile/app/index.tsx:
- Complete routing logic: 
  1. Check onboarding → if not seen, go to /onboarding
  2. Check isAuthenticated → if true, go to /(protected)/home
  3. Check isGuest → if true, go to /(protected)/home
  4. Otherwise → go to /(auth)/login
- Show splash-like loading screen while checking (View bg-white with app icon centered)

Update /mobile/app/(auth)/login.tsx:
- On successful login, router.replace('/(protected)/home') — use replace not push to prevent back navigation to login
- Error state: show error message in a View className='bg-red-50 rounded-xl p-3 mb-4' with Text className='text-red-600 text-sm text-center'
- Disable button while loading

Update /mobile/app/(auth)/register.tsx:
- On successful register (which auto-logs in), router.replace('/(protected)/home')
- Password confirmation validation: show error if passwords don't match
- Email validation: basic format check before submission
- Same error display pattern as login
